name: HNMS Krakatau
events: 6 Aug 1940 HrMs Krakatau (?) arrived at Surabaya, Netherlands East Indies from Batavia (Tandjong Priok), Netherlands East Indies. (1)
15 Aug 1940 HrMs Krakatau (?) departed Surabaya, Netherlands East Indies for Batavia (Tandjong Priok), Netherlands East Indies. (1)
17 Aug 1940 HrMs Krakatau (?) arrived at Batavia (Tandjong Priok), Netherlands East Indies from Surabaya, Netherlands East Indies. (1)
19 Aug 1940 HrMs Krakatau (?) departed Batavia (Tandjong Priok) for the Riau Archipaligo. (1)
21 Aug 1940 HrMs Krakatau (?) arrived in the Riau Archipaligo and relieved HrMs Van Nes (?) on patrol duties there. (1)
24 Sep 1940 HrMs Krakatau (?) grounded in the Riau Archipaligo on an unknown reef during which she sustained some damage. (1)
26 Sep 1940 HrMs Krakatau (?) is ordered to proceed to Surabaya for docking and repairs. (1)
27 Sep 1940 HrMs Krakatau (?) departed the Riau Archipaligo to proceed to Surabaya for repairs. (1)
29 Sep 1940 HrMs Krakatau (?) arrived at Batavia (Tandjong Priok) from the Riau Archipaligo. (1)
30 Sep 1940 HrMs Krakatau (?) departed Batavia (Tandjong Priok) for Surabaya. (1)
